title: HPE security advisory (AV26-691)
description: On July 14, 2026, HPE published a security advisory to address vulnerabilities in the following products:
products: HPE Compute Scale-up Server 3200 - versions prior to v1.76.44
HPE Compute Scale-up Server 3250 - versions prior to v1.02.48
solution: Review the references and apply the necessary updates.
